expectations.text: Output is a markdown table or table-like structured listing
expectations.evidence: Lines 3-6 form a markdown table with pipe delimiters
Line 6: '| us014 | draft | requestor | bulk import ... |'

expectations.text: Table columns include id, status, role, and title
expectations.evidence: Header row: '| id | status | role | title |'

expectations.text: Output includes a count summary line (e.g. '2 stories matched')
